scripts.minto_thesis: Voicecare.ai's AI voice agents reduce patient no-shows by leveraging intelligent reminders and HIPAA-compliant triage.

hook.text: Your clinic is losing patients, and it doesn’t have to.

scene_1.text: Missed calls and no-shows cripple your schedule. It's avoidable.

scene_2.text: AI voice agents handle 62% of calls without human staff. Effortlessly.

scene_4.text: Cut no-shows by 40% in 90 days, with just AI support.
